record.field: Operational health for NSP infrastructure, parking pipeline, Core API, Edge sync, Mobile and Notification.

{"version":2,"searchPanel":null,"widgets":[{"id":"it-edge-unhealthy","type":"stat_action","x":0,"y":0,"w":3,"h":2,"data":{"title":"Edge bất thường","icon":"fa-server","bgColor":"#b91c1c","textColor":"#ffffff","help":"Edge active nhưng không ở trạng thái Online.","showOriginalValue":false},"dataSource":{"type":"python","pythonModel":"nsp.it.dashboard.service","pythonMethod":"get_dashboard_edge_unhealthy","pythonParams":{}},"action":{"model":"nsp.edge.server","name":"Edge bất thường","domain_method":"get_dashboard_domain_unhealthy_edges","domain_model":"nsp.it.dashboard.service","domain_params":{},"view_mode":"list,form"}},{"id":"it-controller-unhealthy","type":"stat_action","x":3,"y":0,"w":3,"h":2,"data":{"title":"Controller bất thường","icon":"fa-microchip","bgColor":"#c2410c","textColor":"#ffffff","help":"Controller active nhưng Offline/Blocked/Revoked/Error.","showOriginalValue":false},"dataSource":{"type":"python","pythonModel":"nsp.it.dashboard.service","pythonMethod":"get_dashboard_controller_unhealthy","pythonParams":{}},"action":{"model":"nsp.controller","name":"Controller bất thường","domain_method":"get_dashboard_domain_unhealthy_controllers","domain_model":"nsp.it.dashboard.service","domain_params":{},"view_mode":"list,form"}},{"id":"it-reader-unhealthy","type":"stat_action","x":6,"y":0,"w":3,"h":2,"data":{"title":"Reader bất thường","icon":"fa-rss","bgColor":"#c2410c","textColor":"#ffffff","help":"RFID Reader đang Offline hoặc Degraded.","showOriginalValue":false},"dataSource":{"type":"python","pythonModel":"nsp.it.dashboard.service","pythonMethod":"get_dashboard_reader_unhealthy","pythonParams":{}},"action":{"model":"nsp.device","name":"Reader bất thường","domain_method":"get_dashboard_domain_unhealthy_readers","domain_model":"nsp.it.dashboard.service","domain_params":{},"view_mode":"list,form"}},{"id":"it-stale-detection","type":"stat_action","x":9,"y":0,"w":3,"h":2,"data":{"title":"Detection tồn đọng","icon":"fa-hourglass-half","bgColor":"#a16207","textColor":"#ffffff","help":"Detection còn Pending quá 30 giây, dấu hiệu pipeline không hoàn tất.","showOriginalValue":false},"dataSource":{"type":"python","pythonModel":"nsp.it.dashboard.service","pythonMethod":"get_dashboard_stale_detections","pythonParams":{"seconds":30}},"action":{"model":"nsp.parking.detection.event","name":"Detection tồn đọng","domain_method":"get_dashboard_domain_stale_detections","domain_model":"nsp.it.dashboard.service","domain_params":{"seconds":30},"view_mode":"list,form"}},{"id":"it-denied-today","type":"stat_action","x":0,"y":2,"w":3,"h":2,"data":{"title":"Parking denied hôm nay","icon":"fa-ban","bgColor":"#b91c1c","textColor":"#ffffff","help":"Tổng Parking Transaction bị từ chối từ đầu ngày theo múi giờ user.","showOriginalValue":false},"dataSource":{"type":"python","pythonModel":"nsp.it.dashboard.service","pythonMethod":"get_dashboard_denied_today","pythonParams":{}},"action":{"model":"nsp.parking.transaction","name":"Parking denied hôm nay","domain_method":"get_dashboard_domain_denied_today","domain_model":"nsp.it.dashboard.service","domain_params":{},"view_mode":"list,form"}},{"id":"it-api-errors","type":"stat_action","x":3,"y":2,"w":3,"h":2,"data":{"title":"Core API lỗi 24h","icon":"fa-plug","bgColor":"#b91c1c","textColor":"#ffffff","help":"Authentication/API request không thành công trong 24 giờ gần nhất.","showOriginalValue":false},"dataSource":{"type":"python","pythonModel":"nsp.it.dashboard.service","pythonMethod":"get_dashboard_api_errors_24h","pythonParams":{}},"action":{"model":"core.api.log","name":"Core API lỗi 24h","domain_method":"get_dashboard_domain_api_errors_24h","domain_model":"nsp.it.dashboard.service","domain_params":{},"view_mode":"list,form"}},{"id":"it-sync-failures","type":"stat","x":6,"y":2,"w":3,"h":2,"data":{"title":"Sync lỗi/tồn đọng","icon":"fa-refresh","bgColor":"#a16207","textColor":"#ffffff","help":"Sync Record Pending/Failed tại node hiện tại. Cloud không cài NSP Sync sẽ hiển thị 0 / Module not installed.","showOriginalValue":false},"dataSource":{"type":"python","pythonModel":"nsp.it.dashboard.service","pythonMethod":"get_dashboard_sync_failures","pythonParams":{}}},{"id":"it-notification-failures","type":"stat","x":9,"y":2,"w":3,"h":2,"data":{"title":"Notification delivery lỗi","icon":"fa-bell","bgColor":"#a16207","textColor":"#ffffff","help":"Delivery Failed hoặc Pending quá 5 phút. Chỉ có trên Cloud cài NSP Notification.","showOriginalValue":false},"dataSource":{"type":"python","pythonModel":"nsp.it.dashboard.service","pythonMethod":"get_dashboard_notification_delivery_failures","pythonParams":{}}},{"id":"it-infra-chart","type":"chart","x":0,"y":4,"w":6,"h":4,"data":{"title":"Infrastructure Health","chartType":"bar","help":"So sánh số node Online và Unhealthy theo Edge/Controller/Reader.","hiddenChartButtons":["line"]},"dataSource":{"type":"python","pythonModel":"nsp.it.dashboard.service","pythonMethod":"get_dashboard_infrastructure_status_chart","pythonParams":{}}},{"id":"it-parking-traffic","type":"chart","x":6,"y":4,"w":6,"h":4,"data":{"title":"Parking Traffic - 24h","chartType":"line","help":"Check-in/Check-out allowed theo giờ trong 24 giờ gần nhất.","hiddenChartButtons":["pie","doughnut","sort"]},"dataSource":{"type":"python","pythonModel":"nsp.it.dashboard.service","pythonMethod":"get_dashboard_parking_traffic_hourly","pythonParams":{"hours":24}}},{"id":"it-denied-reasons","type":"chart","x":0,"y":8,"w":6,"h":4,"data":{"title":"Denied Reasons - 7 ngày","chartType":"bar","help":"Phân bố nguyên nhân từ chối để IT xác định lỗi thẻ, continuity, quyền mượn hoặc cấu hình.","hiddenChartButtons":["line"]},"dataSource":{"type":"python","pythonModel":"nsp.it.dashboard.service","pythonMethod":"get_dashboard_denied_reason_chart","pythonParams":{"days":7}}},{"id":"it-api-health","type":"chart","x":6,"y":8,"w":6,"h":4,"data":{"title":"Core API Traffic/Error - 24h","chartType":"line","help":"Tổng request và request lỗi theo giờ để phát hiện spike/outage.","hiddenChartButtons":["pie","doughnut","sort"]},"dataSource":{"type":"python","pythonModel":"nsp.it.dashboard.service","pythonMethod":"get_dashboard_api_health_hourly","pythonParams":{"hours":24}}},{"id":"it-sync-health","type":"chart","x":0,"y":12,"w":6,"h":4,"data":{"title":"Local Sync Job Health","chartType":"bar","help":"Trạng thái Sync Job tại node hiện tại; hữu ích trên Edge Server.","hiddenChartButtons":["line"]},"dataSource":{"type":"python","pythonModel":"nsp.it.dashboard.service","pythonMethod":"get_dashboard_sync_health_chart","pythonParams":{}}},{"id":"it-mobile-notification","type":"chart","x":6,"y":12,"w":6,"h":4,"data":{"title":"Mobile & Notification Health","chartType":"bar","help":"Active Mobile Session, device gần đây, unread notification và delivery lỗi/tồn đọng.","hiddenChartButtons":["line"]},"dataSource":{"type":"python","pythonModel":"nsp.it.dashboard.service","pythonMethod":"get_dashboard_mobile_notification_health_chart","pythonParams":{}}}]}
